case_title: DAVID TYRONE LOVE VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LEIYI GAO, BANKER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-14-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOVE, DAVID TYRONE AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY LOVE, DAVID TYRONE JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOVE, DAVID TYRONE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOVE, DAVID TYRONE AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOVE, DAVID TYRONE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, PLAINTIFF SUBSTANTIATED THAT HE HAD $400 OF SSI BENEFITS MONEY UNTAINTED BY FRAUD IN HIS ACCOUNT, AND DEFENDANT DID NOT SHOW BY ACCOUNTHOLDER AGREEMENT OR OTHERWISE THAT IT WAS ENTITLED TO PUT THE UNTAINTED BENEFITS MONEY TOWARD MAKING THE BANK WHOLE FOLLOWING THE FRAUD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
